mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, name, phone, birth_date, gender) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{birthDate}, #{gender})
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, name, phone, birth_date, gender FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, username, password_hash, name, phone, birth_date, gender FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
